summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MONO AUREL luxury e-commerce website with cream/beige theme. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core functionality working, theme properly applied, navigation working on both desktop and mobile.

issues: Text color in message textarea uses mono-cream class which may have low contrast on light surface background - consider using mono-primary instead

console_warnings.issue: HTML hydration warnings about span elements inside select/option/table elements
console_warnings.note: These are React hydration warnings from the preview environment, not actual errors - functionality works correctly

backend_api: Health endpoint - GET /api/health returns healthy status
Root API endpoint - GET /api/ returns version info
Products list - GET /api/products returns product list
Quote creation - POST /api/quotes creates quote request
Quotes auth protection - GET /api/admin/quotes returns 401 without auth
Quotes with auth - GET /api/admin/quotes works with admin credentials
Marquee orders admin - GET /api/admin/marquee-orders works with auth
Newsletter duplicate check - Duplicate email returns 400
Admin product CRUD - Create, verify, delete product works
Admin product auth protection - POST without auth returns 401
Admin collection CRUD - Create and delete collection works
frontend: Homepage loads with new cream/beige theme
Shop page loads with product grid
Collection filter buttons present and functional
Product cards display with images and prices
All contact form fields present and styled
Admin panel login works with admin/monoaurel2025
Admin panel tabs (Products, Collections, Quotes, Marquee) accessible
Desktop navigation menu links work correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Contact page textarea uses text-mono-cream class - should use text-mono-primary for better visibility on light background
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded data - 3 products, 5 collections available
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend functionality verified working. Cream/beige theme properly applied across all pages. Navigation works on both desktop and mobile. Previous iteration's navigation issue has been resolved - links now click correctly. Stripe checkout is MOCKED (test mode).
mocked_integrations: Stripe checkout - using test key sk_test_emergent
